## Doc Linking

**File:** `system/rules/doc-linking.md`

Use `[doc NN](relative-path.md)` — never bare "doc NN". Relative paths from source file. Dimensions via `dimensions/NN-name.md`.

## PM Awareness

**File:** `system/rules/pm-awareness.md`

## Self-Improvement
